title: 2-METHYL BENZIMIDAZOLE AS ANALYTICAL REAGENT FOR SILVER
author: PRABHAT K. MISRA
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: 2-Methylbenzimidazole has been used as an analytical reagent for the gravimetric estimation of silver. Influence of some of the cations has also been studied.
steps_raw: 2-Methylbenzimidazole has been used as an analytical reagent for the gravimetric estimation of silver. Influence of some of the cations has also been studied.
